text.烂梗公式化与自定义公式化弹幕_可独立配置采集与展示: Meme formula and custom formula danmu—separate collect and display settings
text.我们的烂梗库内容来自开源项目: Our meme library content comes from open-source projects
text.特此感谢作者与社区的无私分享: , with thanks to authors and the community for sharing.
text.开启后按下方配置独立采集与展示烂梗弹幕_不与_AI_生成弹幕共用展示额度: When on, meme danmu are collected/displayed separately per settings below.
text.全展示_采集结果全部进入展示队列_AI识别展示_由_AI_根据当前画面从候选中筛: Show all: all collects go to display queue. AI pick: AI filters candidates by current screen.
text.仅_自选_分类时可选择标签_最多_3_个: Tags only for Custom category, max 3.
text.选择_TXT_文件_一行一条_最多同时导入_5_个文件_每个文件最多_1000: Select TXT files (one line each); up to 5 files, 1000 lines each; appended to existing pool.
text.启用后_系统会从你保存的自定义弹幕句中抽取短句_用于弹幕不足时补足: When on, pulls short lines from your custom pool when danmu count is low.
text.当屏幕上的弹幕少于该数量时_会从自定义公式化弹幕库中抽取短句补足: When on-screen danmu fall below this count, short lines are pulled from the custom formula pool.
text.关闭自定义公式化弹幕库后_不会进行公式化弹幕补足: With custom formula danmu pool off, no formula danmu fill will occur.
text.一行一条_保存后上屏时完整展示_无字数限制: One line per row; full display on screen, no character limit.
text.当前展示_手动添加条目_txt_导入内容已入库参与抽取_但不在此列表逐条展示: Showing: manual entries. TXT imports are in the pool but not listed here.
text.桌面互动宠物与弹幕指令入口_复用助手模型_不单独请求_AI: Desktop pet and danmu command entry; reuses assistant model, no separate AI call
text.开启后桌宠将显示在桌面_临时隐藏请使用桌宠右键菜单: When on, pet shows on desktop; hide temporarily via pet context menu.
text.开启后固定展示_5_个桌宠_弹幕会以聊天气泡形式显示在桌宠头顶: When on, shows 5 fixed pets; danmu appear as chat bubbles above pets.
text.双击桌宠弹出指令框: Double-click pet to open command box
text.指令不会立即请求_AI_而是注入下一次正常截图弹幕生成_生成时会优先结合你的输入: Commands do not call AI immediately; they merge into the next normal capture. Generation prioritizes your input and current screen.
text.目录中需包含_pet_json_与_spritesheet_webp_或_spr: Folder must contain pet.json and spritesheet.webp or .png. Import replaces current pet; your original local files are kept.
text.k_5_个槽位默认都使用当前默认桌宠_你可以分别为每个槽位切换资源_位置会在桌面: All 5 slots use the current default pet by default. You can switch assets per slot; positions are saved independently on the desktop.
text.编辑系统提示_内置人格可覆盖保存_恢复默认可还原: Edit system prompt; built-ins can be overwritten; restore defaults to reset
text.开启后_弹幕上屏为_人格名称_弹幕内容: When on, danmu show as「Persona name: content」
text.直播输出配置与弹幕姬模式: Live output settings & danmaku relay mode
text.供_OBS_抖音直播伴侣等添加_浏览器源_网页源_采集透明背景_AI_弹幕: For OBS, Douyin Live Companion, etc.: add a「Browser Source / Web Source」for transparent AI danmu (localhost 127.0.0.1).
text.先复制地址_粘贴到直播软件的浏览器源_网页源: Copy the URL first, then paste it into your streaming app's browser/web source.
text.开启后关闭本机屏幕弹幕_横向_Overlay_从下到上悬浮窗_主链路_生成: When on, hides local screen danmu (horizontal overlay / bottom-to-top panel); main「Start danmu」output shows only in bililive_dm. When off, restores screen danmu and stops pushing to bililive_dm; live comment bridge unaffected.
text.教程_弹幕日志_公告与问题反馈: Guide, danmu log, announcements, feedback & community chat
text.选择下方教程查看使用说明: Pick a guide below for instructions
text.加入社群或在群内_我_比私信更不容易触发平台限制: Join the community or @ me in group chat—less likely to hit platform limits than DMs
text.模型名_API_地址_服务商_API_模式_已脱敏: Model name, API endpoint, provider, API mode (redacted)
text.有任何问题可以在qq群_抖音群_小红书群内_我_因为最近很多人私信我_我一一回答: For questions, @ me in QQ/Douyin/Xiaohongshu groups. DMs triggered platform warnings—thanks for understanding. Email: utar00701233@163.com
text.Discord_mock_占位说明: Placeholder invite — not a live server yet
text.运行日志实时同步_WebSocket_优先_失败时自动_HTTP_轮询_已脱敏: Runtime log sync (WebSocket first, HTTP polling fallback), redacted—no API Key shown
text.等待日志_点击_生成弹幕_后_截图_AI_请求与弹幕事件会在此实时显示: Waiting for logs… After Start danmu, capture, AI requests, and danmu events appear here in real time.
text.用自然语言告诉我你想调整什么_我来帮你改设置: Tell me in natural language what to adjust—I will change settings for you
text.说明_涉及_API_Key_删除模型等敏感操作_我会指引你到设置页手动修改: Note: for API Key, model deletion, etc., I will guide you to change settings manually.
text.切换后_后续对话自动使用新模型_当前对话历史保留: After switching, new chats use the new model; current history is kept.
text.告诉我你想调整什么设置_例如_把弹幕速度调快: Tell me what to adjust, e.g.「speed up danmu」
text.告诉_AI_管家想调整什么: Tell AI Butler what to adjust

placeholder.例如_接下来弹幕偏搞笑一点: e.g. make upcoming danmu more humorous
placeholder.例如_语气温柔治愈_像闺蜜一样吐槽主播操作_偶尔玩梗: e.g. gentle, healing tone; tease the streamer like a best friend, occasional memes
placeholder.请描述问题或建议_请勿填写_API_Key_密码或截图中的敏感信息: Describe the issue or suggestion (do not include API Key, passwords, or sensitive screenshot data)
placeholder.告诉我想调整什么设置_Enter_发送_Shift_Enter_换行: Tell me what to adjust... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
